name: Construction accident in Utah - special rules?
description: Workers comp primary; sue third parties.[5]

mainEntity.name: Construction accident in Utah - special rules?

acceptedAnswer.text: Workers comp primary; sue third parties.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Standard workers comp applies; third-party suits common for equipment fails.[5] Context: High risk jobs get full medical/lost wages.[5] Key factors: OSHA reports help; scaffold laws strict. Practical guidance: Report to OSHA too; preserve gear photos. Lawyer handles complexity. Benefits generous for severe cases.
